'''tavozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tablebase|tablebase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tablebase|tablebase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tavozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tævezheth|tævezheth]] || [[word:tævezhej|tævezhej]] || [[word:tævezhesh|tævezhesh]] || [[word:tævezhe|tævezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tavovozhoth|tavovozhoth]] || [[word:tavovozhoj|tavovozhoj]] || [[word:tavovozhosh|tavovozhosh]] || [[word:tavovozho|tavovozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tavozhoth|tavozhoth]] || [[word:tavozhoj|tavozhoj]] || [[word:tavozhosh|tavozhosh]] || [[word:tavozho|tavozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tavofzhoth|tavofzhoth]] || [[word:tavofzhoj|tavofzhoj]] || [[word:tavofzhosh|tavofzhosh]] || [[word:tavofzhof|tavofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tavozhotho|tavozhotho]] || [[word:tavozhojo|tavozhojo]] || [[word:tavozhosho|tavozhosho]] || [[word:tavozhoko|tavozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tavozhoth|tavozhoth]] || [[word:tavozhoj|tavozhoj]] || [[word:tavozhosh|tavozhosh]] || [[word:tavozho|tavozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tavozhothol|tavozhothol]] || [[word:tavozhojol|tavozhojol]] || [[word:tavozhoshol|tavozhoshol]] || [[word:tavozhokol|tavozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tavozhothotho|tavozhothotho]] || [[word:tavozhojojo|tavozhojojo]] || [[word:tavozhoshosho|tavozhoshosho]] || [[word:tavozhoko|tavozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tavozhothon|tavozhothon]] || [[word:tavozhojon|tavozhojon]] || [[word:tavozhoshon|tavozhoshon]] || [[word:tavozhokon|tavozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tavozhothoro|tavozhothoro]] || [[word:tavozhojoro|tavozhojoro]] || [[word:tavozhoshoro|tavozhoshoro]] || [[word:tavozhokoro|tavozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
